message:
🐛 Fix broken sidebar links and duplicate News section (#1237)

* 🐛 Use Next.js Link for client-side navigation between projects

Replace HTML <a> tags with Next.js <Link> in RelatedProjects sidebar
to enable client-side navigation. This prevents full page reloads
when switching between KubeStellar Console, MCP, and other sections.

Falls back to <a> for absolute URLs (cross-domain branch deploys).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix broken general section links and duplicate News in sidebar

- General section links (Contributing, Community, News) now use the
  first child page route instead of the folder route, which 404'd
- When viewing a general section, show its children directly instead
  of the folder wrapper, eliminating the duplicate entry

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
